## Mga Live Stream Recording

Panoorin ang recordings mula sa mga creator na gumagamit ng LiveStreamRecorder para i-save ang live streams nila.

Ginagamit ng mga creator ang platform namin para awtomatikong i-record ang TikTok Lives, Twitch streams, YouTube broadcasts, at Kick streams nila. Panoorin ang content nila, manood ng recordings, at tumuklas ng bagong creators.

### Panoorin at Mag-download

Agad mapapanood ang bawat recording. Pwedeng mag-download ng recordings ang Premium users para sa offline viewing.

Gusto mong nasa platform ang streams mo? Mag-sign up nang libre at magsimulang mag-record. I-paste ang channel URL mo, mag-live, at awtomatikong nase-save namin ang lahat. Gamitin ang ClipAI para gawing short clips ang streams mo at palakihin ang audience mo.

Sinusuportahan namin ang TikTok live recording, Twitch VOD saving, YouTube live recording, Kick stream recording, AfreecaTV recording, at Pandalive recording. May mas marami pang platform na darating.

about.joilive:
## Mga Joilive Stream Recording

Walang archive ang Joilive. Walang replay tab sa profile mo, walang past-streams list, walang VOD. Ginawa ang platform sa paligid ng live moment — kapag tumigil ka mag-broadcast, wala na ang stream. Okay lang iyan para sa casual short Lives, pero real problem ito kung regular kang nagse-stream at gusto mong manatili ang trabaho mo. Pinapayagan ng LiveStreamRecorder ang Joilive streamers na **i-record ang sariling broadcasts nila** kaya bawat Live ay napupunta bilang watchable, shareable video sa personal creator page.

### Ang Black Screen Issue sa Joilive

Kung sinubukan mo nang mag-record ng Joilive stream mo gamit ang desktop recorder (display capture ng OBS Studio, Xbox Game Bar sa Windows, QuickTime sa Mac), napansin mo siguro ang ganito: nare-record ang audio, pero black rectangle ang lumalabas sa video. Iyan ang Joilive web player na gumagamit ng hardware-accelerated decoding plus Widevine DRM. Nakikita ng recorder ang player pero hindi makita ang video frame. Hindi bug ng Joilive, hindi sira ang recorder mo — side effect ito ng kung paano na-composite ang protected video sa modern browsers, at hindi maaayos sa pamamagitan ng pagbabago ng settings sa makina mo.

Ang practical workaround ay huwag nang mag-screen record. Sine-capture ng LiveStreamRecorder ang Joilive stream upstream ng browser, bago ma-involve ang DRM/compositing path. Walang black screen, walang codec hunting, walang GPU acceleration toggles — gumagana lang ang recording.

### Self-Recording, Server-Side

Nagre-record ka ng sariling stream mo, pero wala kang pinapatakbo. Walang app sa phone, walang software sa PC. Kapag nag-live ka sa Joilive app, awtomatikong magsisimula ang recording sa cloud. Mag-stream mula sa couch mo, sa kotse mo, sa coffee shop — pwedeng naka-off ang laptop mo, pwedeng naka-lock ang phone mo. Napupunta ang Joilive Lives mo sa creator page mo kapag natapos ang bawat broadcast, handa nang panoorin ulit sa browser.

### Panoorin at Mag-download ng Joilive Recordings Mo

Nagpa-play agad ang bawat naka-record na Live sa kahit anong modern browser, walang app na kailangan, walang Joilive account para manood. Pwedeng mag-download ng raw video file ang Premium streamers para sa editing, re-uploading, o local archival — at pwedeng awtomatikong mag-generate ang ClipAI ng short-form clips mula sa recording para sa posting sa TikTok, YouTube Shorts, o Reels.

### Shareable URL para sa Lives Mo

Ang sariling room URL ng Joilive ay `joilive.net/user/index.html?s=1880…` — mahabang numeric ID na walang makakapag-type o makakaala. Gumagamit ang LiveStreamRecorder recordings mo ng clean URLs tulad ng `livestreamrecorder.com/joilive/your-id/video/...` na pwede mong i-post sa Discord, i-paste sa Twitter bios, o ipadala sa fans via text. Parehong content, walang query string, walang app install na hinihingi.

### Ginawa para sa Joilive Streamers, Hindi Laban sa Kanila

Hindi nagda-download ng broadcasts ng ibang tao ang LiveStreamRecorder. Opt-in ang recording ng Joilive streamer para sa **sariling** account, at sariling Lives lang — wala nang iba. Sa iyo ang video, sa iyo ang page, one-click action ang deletion. Mag-sign up nang libre, idagdag ang Joilive user ID mo, at hindi na magiging problema mo ang missing archive ng Joilive.

about.live17:
## Mga 17live Recording sa LiveStreamRecorder

Ang 17live (binibigkas na *yi-qi live* — 一起, Mandarin para sa "magkasama") ay ang ikatlong pinakamalaking live-streaming platform sa Asya, itinatag sa Taiwan noong 2015 at naka-headquarter sa Japan mula 2021. Tumatanggap ito ng parehong **Livers** (human streamers) at **V-Livers** (virtual avatar streamers — category na pinasimulan ng 17live). Malakas sa Japan, Taiwan, Hong Kong, Singapore, at Pilipinas, naka-list sa SGX bilang **LVR**. Pinapanatili ng LiveStreamRecorder ang buo, web-accessible recording ng bawat Live na ibino-broadcast mo — katabi ng in-app Stream Archive ng 17live pero sa open web.

### Bakit Second Recording Kung May Stream Archive na ang 17live?

Maganda ang sariling Stream Archive ng 17live — nag-iimbak ito ng recent Lives sa loob ng 17live app, naka-gate ng permission toggles mo. Pero kailangan ng fans ang 17live app para manood, hindi naka-index ng Google ang archive, at walang stable public URL bawat broadcast na pwede mong i-paste sa Discord o Twitter bio. Complementary ang LiveStreamRecorder, hindi competitive: parehong broadcast na na-capture sa pangalawang beses, ngayon ay napunta sa public web URL tulad ng `livestreamrecorder.com/live17/your-id/video/...` na pwedeng buksan agad ng kahit anong browser.

### Parehong Capture para sa Livers at V-Livers

Nire-record namin ang ibino-broadcast ng 17live — face-cam Liver ka man na nagcha-chat / song / dance, OBS-composed Liver na may custom scene, o V-Liver na nagpapatakbo ng Live2D / 3D avatars. Upstream sa distribution ng 17live ang capture, kaya ang final video mo ay magkamukha sa nakita ng fans live: avatar, overlays, voice changes, gift animations, lahat naka-preserve.

### Walang App sa Phone, Walang OBS sa PC

Server-side. Mag-stream ka mula sa phone o PC gaya ng dati, nangyayari ang recording sa infrastructure namin. Pagkatapos magsimula ang Live mo, pwedeng matulog ang phone mo, pwedeng naka-off na ang laptop mo — nagpapatuloy ang recording. Walang CPU drain, walang GPU load, walang extra battery cost. Mahalaga ito sa long-format singing o talk Lives na umaabot ng 4+ oras.

### Lampas sa 90-Second Clip Limit

Maganda ang in-app Stream Clips ng 17live para sa pag-share sa loob ng app pero capped sila sa 15–90 segundo at hindi umaalis sa surface ng 17live. Pwedeng gamitin ng Premium streamers ang ClipAI sa LiveStreamRecorder para magputol ng highlight clips ng kahit anong haba mula sa buong saved Lives, naka-format para sa **TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts** — ang platforms kung saan talaga nag-eexist ang karamihan ng non-17live viewers. Gamitin sila bilang funnel pabalik sa 17live room mo.

### Ginawa para sa Talent-Managed at Indie Streamers Pareho

Aktibong nag-sscout at sumusuporta ang talent management system ng 17live sa mga streamer — bahagi iyan ng nagpapakaiba sa platform mula sa purely self-serve apps. Hindi humihipo ang LiveStreamRecorder sa kahit ano sa mga iyon. Hindi nagla-log in sa 17live account mo, hindi nakakahadlang sa Hot Star events, gifting promos, o tools ng talent agency mo. Passive parallel recording lang ito — kontrol mo, URL mo, archive mo.

### Panoorin sa Browser, Mag-download Kung Kailangan

Nagpa-play agad ang bawat 17live recording sa kahit anong modern browser. Walang 17live account na kailangan para manood — i-share ang URL sa kahit kanino, kahit saan. Pwedeng mag-download ng raw HEVC video file ang Premium creators mula sa bawat Live para sa re-editing, pag-upload sa YouTube bilang long-form VOD, o local archival.

### Opt-In, Sariling Content Mo

Nagre-record lang ang LiveStreamRecorder ng sariling profile mo, pagkatapos mong mag-opt in. Parehong legal posture ang recording sa pag-download ng sariling Lives mo mula sa in-app Stream Archive ng 17live — naka-store lang sa ibang surface (public web URL sa domain mo sa halip na sa loob ng app). Itigil ang recording kahit kailan, burahin ang kahit anong recording sa isang click.
about.kwai:
## Mga Kwai Recording sa LiveStreamRecorder

Ang Kwai (mula sa Mandarin 快 *kuài*, ibig sabihin ay "mabilis") ay ang global short-video + live-streaming app mula sa **Kuaishou Technology** (HKEX 1024), kadalasang tinatawag na #2 short-video platform sa Asya pagkatapos ng Douyin/TikTok. Labas sa China, dominant ang Kwai sa **Brazil** (ang pinakamalaki niyang market, naka-rival sa TikTok), plus Indonesia, Mexico, Argentina, Colombia, Middle East, at Russia/CIS. Nagca-capture ang LiveStreamRecorder ng bawat Kwai Live sa **public, web-accessible recording** — labas sa Kwai app, sa open web, na-iindex ng Google.

### Kwai sa Loob ng App vs. Kwai sa Open Web

Ginawa ang Kwai sa paligid ng in-app feed niya: mag-scroll ng short videos, sumali sa Live, magpadala ng gifts via K-coins, lahat sa loob ng Kwai surface. Gumagana iyan nang maganda para sa users na nasa Kwai na. Pero sa sandaling wala sa Kwai ang fans mo — Brazilian fans sa WhatsApp / Instagram, Indonesian followers sa Telegram, viewers sa markets kung saan hindi naka-install ang Kwai — wala na ang broadcast. Nire-record ng LiveStreamRecorder ang bawat Kwai Live sa public URL tulad ng `livestreamrecorder.com/kwai/your-username/video/...` na pwedeng buksan ng kahit sino sa kahit anong browser. Walang Kwai install na kailangan para manood, walang Kwai account, walang app gate.

### Ginawa para sa Mobile-First, Cellular-First Creators

Ang pinakamalaking markets ng Kwai — Brazil, Indonesia, MENA — ay markets din kung saan mahalagang resources ang mobile data at battery. Ayaw ng creators na maging mainit ang phone dahil sa OBS o screen recorder sa background. Naiintindihan namin. Nagre-record ang LiveStreamRecorder server-side. Nagbo-broadcast ka sa Kwai mula sa phone mo gaya ng normal — pwedeng mag-lock ang screen ng phone mo, matulog, mawalan ng call — nagpapatuloy ang recording sa infrastructure namin. Zero CPU, zero GPU, zero extra battery cost sa device mo.

### Ang Brazilian Kwai Discovery Gap

Massive ecosystem ang Kwai BR, pero halos invisible siya sa open Portuguese-language web. I-Google search ang Brazilian Kwai creator at kadalasan ay thin profile pages o third-party tracker sites lang makukuha mo. Malinis, na-iindex, at shareable ang LiveStreamRecorder URLs — nakakakuha ang Brazilian creators ng real Google footprint sa unang pagkakataon, na bawat Kwai Live ay nagsisilbing permanent SEO-discoverable page. Pareho rin sa Indonesian / Mexican / Argentinian creators sa kanilang markets.

### ClipAI: Mula sa Kwai Live papuntang TikTok / Reels / Shorts

Dominant ang Kwai sa emerging markets, pero dominant pa rin ang TikTok / Instagram / YouTube sa global discovery. Sini-scan ng ClipAI ang saved Kwai Lives mo at nagpuputol ng vertical highlight clips na naka-format para sa **TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts** — ang discovery layer labas sa Kwai. Music covers, dance, comedy bits, gift reactions, viewer interactions — i-cross-post sila para palawakin ang audience funnel mo pabalik sa Kwai Lives mo.

### Panoorin sa Browser, Mag-download Kung Kailangan

Nagpa-play agad ang bawat saved Kwai Live sa kahit anong modern browser. Walang Kwai account na kailangan para sa viewers. Pwedeng mag-download ng raw HEVC video file ang Premium creators mula sa bawat Live para sa re-editing bilang long-form YouTube content, compilation videos, o local archival.

### Hindi Humihipo sa Kwai Account o Revenue Mo

Hindi nagla-log in ang LiveStreamRecorder sa Kwai account mo, hindi nakakakita ng K-coins, hindi binabasa ang gifting income mo, hindi nakakahadlang sa Kwai's creator program tiers. Opt-in ang recording mo bilang Kwai creator para sa **sariling** account, at sariling Lives lang — wala nang iba. Nananatili sa Kwai ang Kwai account state, ranking, at rev-share mo.

### Opt-In, Sariling Content Mo, Burahin Kahit Kailan

Nagre-record lang ang LiveStreamRecorder ng sariling profile mo, pagkatapos mong mag-opt in. Itigil ang recording flow kahit kailan. Burahin ang kahit anong past Kwai recording sa isang click. Content mo, URL mo, kontrol mo — independent sa Kwai app, sa open public web kung saan finally mahahanap ka ng ibang potential audience mo.

## NimoTV Live Recordings on LiveStreamRecorder

NimoTV (launched 2018 by Huya, part of Tencent's global gaming ecosystem) is the international mobile-esports streaming platform — purpose-built for the mobile-gaming explosion happening across **Brazil, Indonesia, Thailand, Mexico, and Peru**. The catalogue is dominated by **Mobile Legends: Bang Bang, Free Fire, PUBG Mobile, Call of Duty: Mobile, Wild Rift, and Arena of Valor**. Its creator base is mostly phone-only — no PC, no OBS, no capture card. When a ranked grind ends, the broadcast is gone. LiveStreamRecorder catches every match before it disappears, on a public web URL fans can rewatch anytime.

### Phone-Only Capture, Server-Side

The NimoTV creator workflow is brutally simple: open the NimoTV app, hit go-live, play the game, end the stream. There's no native VOD export. There's no "keep my last broadcast for replay" button you can rely on across regions and account tiers. And a phone running a ranked Mobile Legends match doesn't have spare resources to also run a screen recorder in the background — thermals, FPS, battery, and data all suffer. LiveStreamRecorder runs entirely in our cloud. Your phone broadcasts on NimoTV the way it always has; we capture the stream upstream and store it on your creator page.

### Full-Length Matches, Not 30-Second Clips

Mobile esports matches are long. MLBB ranked grinds run hours, Free Fire squads rotate through round after round, PUBG Mobile final-circle hunts can stretch a broadcast past 4 hours. NimoTV's in-app clip and replay surfaces, where they exist, are short-form by design. LiveStreamRecorder saves the full broadcast — every match, every draft phase, every comms moment — at full length, ready to scrub. Want to review a teamfight you lost? Pull the recording, jump to the timestamp. Want a specific MVP highlight for a thumbnail? Clip it from the saved Live.

### Brazilian and Indonesian Discovery, the Open Web Way

NimoTV is huge inside its app in Brazil and SE Asia. It is also almost completely invisible on the open Portuguese, Spanish, and Indonesian web. Search for a top Brazilian MLBB streamer on Google and you'll get thin profile pages, third-party trackers, or nothing useful. Your LiveStreamRecorder creator page is indexable, shareable, and openable in any browser — your Lives finally get a real Google footprint.

### Cross-Posting to Where Mobile Gaming Fans Actually Hang Out

#MLBB, #FreeFire, #PUBGM, #MobileGaming — the mobile esports community lives across TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, Discord, and language-specific community apps. Most don't have the NimoTV app installed and aren't going to install it to watch one stream. ClipAI scans your saved NimoTV Lives and cuts vertical highlight clips formatted for **TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts** — clutch plays, MVP moments, gift reactions. Use them as the funnel that brings new fans back to your NimoTV channel.

### Watch in Browser, Download if You Need It

Every saved NimoTV Live plays instantly in any modern browser. No NimoTV account needed to watch. Premium creators can download the raw video file from each Live — useful for uploading full matches to YouTube as long-form gaming content, cutting compilations, or local archival.

### Doesn't Touch Your NimoTV Account or Diamond Income

LiveStreamRecorder never logs into your NimoTV account, doesn't see diamond income, doesn't read your gifting stats, and doesn't interfere with Huya / Tencent creator program tiers or partner status. The recording is opt-in by you as the NimoTV creator for **your own** account, and only your own Lives — nothing else. Your NimoTV ranking, watch-time, gifting, and partner status remain entirely on NimoTV.

### Opt-In, Delete Anytime

LiveStreamRecorder only records your own profile, only after you opt in. Stop recording any time. Delete any past NimoTV Live with a single click. Your content, your URL, your control — independent of the NimoTV app, built for mobile esports creators who don't have time to also run a recording rig.

## VK Live Recordings on LiveStreamRecorder

VK Live is the livestreaming layer inside **VKontakte (VK)**, Russia's biggest social network with over 100 million monthly active users. Unlike standalone streaming apps, VK Live is woven directly into VK's social graph — broadcasts appear in friends' feeds, get reposted into communities, integrate with **VK Music** and the **VK Play** gaming platform, and reach an audience that spans Russia, Belarus, Kazakhstan, and Russian-speaking communities worldwide. Since 2022, when Western livestreaming options became harder to access from Russia, VK Live has grown significantly as the de-facto livestreaming home for Russian-speaking creators. LiveStreamRecorder records every VK Live broadcast to a stable, public web URL — built for creators who want their work to outlive a single news cycle in the VK feed.

### The VK Feed Buries Streams Within Hours

VK Live is a social-first stream surface. The strength of that design: a Live shows up in followers' feeds in real time, can be reposted into communities, pulls live engagement from the VK social graph. The weakness of that design: the VK algorithm prioritizes fresh content. Within a few hours of going offline, your broadcast slides down the feed. Within 24 hours, even popular VK Lives are effectively invisible to anyone who didn't catch them live. There's no proper archive UX, no dedicated past-streams view on your profile. Fans who'd love to rewatch a Dota 2 match, share a music set with a friend, or pull up that one clutch CS round you had last weekend have no real place to go.

LiveStreamRecorder gives every VK Live broadcast a stable URL on your creator page that exists independently of the VK feed cycle. The feed moves on, your archive stays.

### Built for the VK Live Creator Mix

VK Live's creator base is broad and category-rich. **Gaming**: Dota 2, CS 2, World of Tanks, Standoff 2 — the cornerstones of the Russian-speaking gaming community. **Music**: artists running album drops, acoustic sets, electronic DJ sets, often integrated with their VK Music releases. **IRL and lifestyle**: vlog-style streams, cooking, travel (where geopolitics allows), commentary on news and pop culture. **Anime and manga commentators**: reaction streams, watch-alongs, deep-dive discussions. **Educational**: language learning, coding tutorials, exam prep. The capture is upstream of your local hardware, so whatever you broadcast — OBS scene composition, gameplay overlays, music visualisers, webcam-only chat — preserves exactly as your fans saw it.

### A Permanent Home for Long-Form Content

The VK feed is built for short attention spans — quick scrolling, fast engagement, fresh posts every few hours. That's fine for a 2-minute clip and actively hostile to a 3-hour Dota grind or a 90-minute concert set. A permanent archive on LiveStreamRecorder is the long-form counterpart: fans who want to actually sit with your stream, rewatch a specific match, or share a moment with a friend get a stable URL that works the same way next week and next year. The clip lives in the feed; the full broadcast lives on your creator page.

### Russian, CIS, and Diaspora Audiences

VK is dominant inside Russia, Belarus, and Kazakhstan, but Russian-speaking communities also live throughout Europe, Israel, the US, and Canada — many of whom don't actively maintain a VK account day-to-day. LiveStreamRecorder URLs work in any browser, anywhere in the world, with no VK login required to watch. Your diaspora fans get a way to keep up with your work that doesn't depend on them maintaining an active VK presence.

### Cross-Platform Reach with ClipAI

ClipAI scans your saved VK Live broadcasts and cuts vertical short-form clips ready for **TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts**, and VK's own short-video features. Highlight plays from a Dota match, music drops from a concert set, funny chat moments, IRL reactions — turn one long broadcast into a stream of shareable content that brings new fans back to your VK Live channel.

### Watch in Browser, Download if You Need It

Every saved VK Live plays instantly in any modern browser, no VK account required. Premium creators can download the raw video file from each broadcast — useful for re-uploading full matches to YouTube as long-form content, cutting compilations, or local archival on your own machine.

### Doesn't Touch Your VK Account or Integrations

LiveStreamRecorder never logs into your VK account, doesn't interact with VK Music tags, doesn't touch VK Play integrations, and doesn't affect any of VK's creator-side metrics, monetization, or community management. The recording is opt-in by you as the VK Live creator for **your own** account, and only captures your own broadcasts — nothing else. Your VK profile, community pages, friend graph, and creator status stay entirely within VK.

### Opt-In, Delete Anytime

LiveStreamRecorder only records your own profile, only after you opt in. Stop the recording flow any time. Delete any past VK Live with a single click. Your content, your URL, your control — a permanent archive of your work on the open web, where the VK feed buries streams fast but your back catalogue stays put.
